subject: RE: Infrastructure Blocker - Dev2 BDV2 Deployment

content.assessment: Escalation reviewed. This is a LEGITIMATE infrastructure issue, not an excuse.
content.commendation: Correct action to escalate rather than marking complete without E2E validation.

guidance.immediate: Create infrastructure fix bead targeting dev2's NextAuth mismatch
guidance.validation: Once fixed, proceed with E2E browser validation for clawd-1il

content.priority: P1-HIGH - Auth stories are blocking other work
content.note: Good leadership in providing honest assessment. Layer 2 validation approach (verifying code + unit tests while acknowledging E2E blocker) is appropriate.
